desc: DetectionFindWallMountLocationByCategoryCommand — ribbon wrapper over the wall-mount MCP reader.
summary: DetectionFindWallMountLocationByCategoryCommand — ribbon wrapper over the wall-mount MCP reader.
usecase: Positioning hint for a wall-mounted device.
precondition: Active document; room resolvable; target_kind supplied.
logictree:
1) Resolver_RoomId required OR single Room selection.
2) Resolver_TargetKind required; validate against strategy registry.
3) Delegate to DetectionFindWallMountLocationByCategory.GetAll(doc, roomId, targetKind).
4) Tracker output + TaskDialog on Human path.
